price.public: $499/month management fee + client-funded ad spend
price.billingMode: Stripe recurring subscription
price.stripeStatus: Live Market Capture Starter Price configured

fulfillmentSteps: Confirm payment and client-funded ad spend
Prepare campaign plan and launch checklist
approvalGates: No paid ad launch without admin approval
issueHandling: If checkout fails, create payment-required admin task and send manual payment link after owner approval
If assets are missing, move to asset collection and notify client
If ad platform approval blocks launch, document the reason and revise creative or targeting
renewalMotion: Monthly report plus next-area recommendation before renewal date.
readinessNotes: Ready to sell. First real customer still needs to complete the full intake-payment-launch-report loop.

price.public: $499/month Market Capture management + client-funded ad spend; includes up to 5 jobsites/month; additional jobsite clusters $49 each
price.billingMode: Market Capture subscription plus manual add-on if needed
price.stripeStatus: Use Market Capture checkout; add-ons require owner-approved invoice

fulfillmentSteps: Collect jobsite addresses and proof assets
Validate address quality and radius rules
Create one fulfillment location per approved jobsite
approvalGates: Client must confirm jobsites are valid and usable
No before/after or customer proof claims without client approval
issueHandling: If jobsite data is incomplete, keep campaign in target-area review
If proof photos are rejected, request alternate assets
If radius is too narrow, recommend neighborhood or ZIP-level fallback
renewalMotion: Recommend the next completed jobsite cluster after each monthly report.
readinessNotes: Ready to sell as a Market Capture variant with structured jobsite intake, radius defaults, proof workflow, and location-level report template.

price.public: $499/month Market Capture management + client-funded ad spend; direct mail saturation quoted separately from verified route counts
price.billingMode: Market Capture subscription plus manual direct-mail quote
price.stripeStatus: Use Market Capture checkout; direct mail requires quote approval

deliverables: Direct mail or digital saturation plan
fulfillmentSteps: Collect desired neighborhoods, ZIPs, or route clusters
Score area fit by service, budget, and timing
Create one fulfillment location per approved area
approvalGates: Direct mail proof approval before print
issueHandling: If route counts are unavailable, hold quote until verified
If budget is too small, reduce area size before launch
If direct mail proof changes after approval, restart proof review
renewalMotion: Use the monthly report to recommend repeat exposure or next-neighborhood expansion.
readinessNotes: Ready to sell as a Market Capture variant with structured neighborhood intake, scoring, fulfillment locations, and an area-level report template.

price.public: $499/month digital management + client-funded ad spend + owner-approved direct mail quote

Create postcard proof and route count quote
Launch digital manually and hand off print
issueHandling: If print timeline slips, update client with revised in-home window
If QR or UTM is missing, pause launch until tracking is fixed
If proof is rejected, restart approval timeline
renewalMotion: Recommend repeat digital exposure before and after direct mail in-home window.
